zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII於1105年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維時，他的父親Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle31歲，母親Nesta ferch Rhys21歲。他於1145年與Alice Montgomery在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1177年9月1日在英國波克夏維爾福德享年72歲，埋葬在英國波克夏維爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII于1105年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維时，他的父亲Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle31岁，母亲Nesta ferch Rhys21岁。他于1145年与Alice Montgomery在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1177年9月1日在英国波克夏維爾福德享年72岁，埋葬在英国波克夏維爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whyte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland): variant of   White  . This form of the surname is common mainly in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Whyde
meanings: English: perhaps an altered form of   Whyte   or   Hyde  .

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.
Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII was born in 1105, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, was 31 and his mother, Nesta ferch Rhys, was 21. He married Alice Montgomery in 1145, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 September 1177, in Welford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Welford, Berkshire, England.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII est né en 1105, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Nesta ferch Rhys, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Montgomery en 1145, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1177, à Welford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Welford, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII 1105 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle 31 und seine Mutter Nesta ferch Rhys 21. Er hat 1145 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Alice Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1177 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Welford, Berkshire, England und wurde in Welford, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII è nato il nel 1105 nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Nesta ferch Rhys, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alice Montgomery nel 1145, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1177, nel Welford, Berkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Welford, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIIIが1105年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで生まれた時，父Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castleは31歳，母Nesta ferch Rhysは21歳であった。1145年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでAlice Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1177年9月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアウエルフォードで72歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアウエルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII(이)가 1105년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Nesta ferch Rhys(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1145년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Alice Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 9월 1일 영국 버크실르 웰퍼드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 웰퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII nasceu em 1105, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Nesta ferch Rhys, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Montgomery em 1145, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1177, em Welford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Welford, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII родился в 1105 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Nesta ferch Rhys, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Montgomery в 1145 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1177 г. в местности велфорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности велфорд, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII nació en 1105, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Nesta ferch Rhys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice Montgomery en 1145, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1177, en Welford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Welford, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
